events.title: Ecstantric Dance
events.description: A curated evening at the intersection of tantra and ecstatic dance. Katya Reihan opens with somatic tantra practice — inviting participants into breath, body, and relational presence — before DJ Goldie (Sean Goldberg) takes the arc into high-energy ecstatic dance. The progression from intimate somatic ground into full-body movement creates a rare bridge between two traditions that rarely share the same floor. Ubud-based facilitators, Lodtunduh area venue. Ticket holders receive address details. Drop-in welcome.
events.short_description: Katya Reihan leads somatic tantra practice before DJ Goldie takes the arc into ecstatic dance — two traditions, one curated evening.
events.venue_address: Lodtunduh area, Ubud (address shared with ticket holders)
events.organizer_name: Ecstantric Dance — Katya Reihan & DJ Goldie
